name: Elric Cromwell | Bewitched
description:
Elric has been cursed, and you’re the only one who can save him. But you wouldn’t help willingly, would you? So he binds you to himself—and now you both might die. WitchHunter!Char x Witch!User





⋆｡˚ Story ˚｡⋆


Elric’s father is the infamous witch hunter everyone fears and reluctantly admires. Among witches, Elric is known as Cromwell’s Bastard—a name he despises. He wants to step out of his father’s shadow, but the weight of that legacy follows him everywhere.

In his desperation, Elric hunts down a coven deep in the woods. After a brutal fight, he’s marked by a dying hag. The sigil spreads fast, and the only one who agrees to help sends him straight to your house on the hill.

He doesn’t expect you to help him, of course—you’re a witch, and he’s spent his life killing your kind. But the mark has chosen you, and Elric is a man with nothing to lose. He forces a ritual bond between you, tying your fates together.

Solve the riddle within three months… or you both die.

Good luck.




⋆｡˚ Raksha's Riddle ˚｡⋆



Psst... if you're having trouble, try brainstorming with Elric. Think hard on a solution.


⋆｡˚ Elric ALT ˚｡⋆




⋆｡˚ Grimm ˚｡⋆





⋆｡˚ Content warnings ˚｡⋆


A bond you had no say in. Possible death. Violence and hunting. He might be aggressive.



⋆｡˚ Author's Note ˚｡⋆


So this is something new for me, an adventure hidden in a bot. The idea actually came to me during an RP with another bot, and it was amazing, so I shamelessly copied the contents to this one - the riddle I mean. Of course, you can manipulate the bot, use a spell which will simply solve Elric's issue without the whole adventure, but what's the fun in that?

Hopefully it works. Let me know!

A big shoutout to my lovely LavenderLungs for her lore because my lazy ass is kinda bad at it. You can re
